prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `cf133acc`.
codex_response:
Implemented `cf133acc` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: each broken horizontal bar contributes a spine column at its gap; the gap is filled, the spine is colored in stacked segments by bar row order from top to bottom, and the rows below the last bar take the color of the existing lower marker already present in that column. I used the Opus hint as a starting point and rejected the Sonnet hint in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_cf133acc/notes.md#L1) because it described the downward propagation too loosely.

The task package is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_cf133acc/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_cf133acc/verifier.py#L1), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_cf133acc/generator.py#L1). No new shared primitive was needed. The generator matches the family by sampling fixed 15x15 grids with two spine columns, 1-5 broken-bar rows, left/right/both-row combinations, and lower marker segments, and it rejects accidental non-spine `x0x` gaps so the distribution stays in-family.

Validation passed:
- Official examples: `pass cf133acc: 4/4 official examples passed`
- Build: 1000 examples written to [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/cf133acc/task.json)
- Generated verification: `pass cf133acc: 1000/1000 generated examples passed`
- Preview sanity check: [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/cf133acc/previews/preview_01.png), plus [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/cf133acc/previews/originals.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/cf133acc/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/cf133acc/previews/preview_03.png)
